# Trout Lily

*Erythronium americanum*

A spring ephemeral: mottled green-and-brown leaves (the "trout" markings) and a
nodding yellow flower. Gone by full leaf-out.

## Where seen

- [Ridgeline Loop](../../trails/ridgeline-loop.md), shaded north side below the
  ridge.

## On these walks

- [2026-05-02](../../daily/2026-05-02.md) — carpets in bloom.
